name: Cappucino Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl and mix well until fully combined.
2. Transfer the mixture to an airtight container for storage.
To serve:
1. Measure 1 tablespoon plus 1 teaspoon of the mix into a cup.
2. Add 1 cup boiling water to the cup.
3. Stir the mixture thoroughly until dissolved.
